.file-embed.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.external-link[data-tooltip-position=\".background: linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)) no-repeat scroll 100% 3.75px / 12.375px padding-box border-box, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) url("app://obsidian.md/public/images/6155340132a851f6089e.svg") no-repeat scroll 100% 3.75px / 12.375px padding-box border-box

code.background: rgb(229, 229, 229) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgba(0, 68, 255, 0.25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgba(0, 68, 255, 0.25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(229, 229, 229) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(229, 229, 229) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
